title: Chronik to heimlern outcome bridge
goal: Make real operator routing outcomes available to heimlern through Chronik as append-only historical transport while keeping heimlern offline and proposal-only.
completion: Chronik outcome export surface is audited before any bridge implementation claim.
A redacted operator outcome event/export contract is defined with source identity, freshness and digest fields.
heimlern can consume Chronik-shaped outcome exports in a review-only smoke and emit a report or proposal without applying policy.
Bureau records review status for heimlern proposals and Leitstand remains a read-only display candidate.

metadata.source_decision: User asked which organ should be connected for heimlern; live repo review selected Chronik as primary because it owns historical outcomes.
